ddls:
CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number (e.g., 3, 3.1, 3.2) */,
  "patch_level" TEXT /* Patch level of the version (e.g., 3.1.1) */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  "deprecation_date" TEXT /* Deprecation date of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the version */,
  "is_stable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the version is stable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file in the codebase */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., PHP, CSS, JS) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last modified date and time of the file */,
  "is_binary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the file is binary */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the change was made in */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file the change was made to */,
  "line_number" INTEGER /* Line number where the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., filter, action) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the change was made */,
  "is_reverted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the change has been reverted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_changes_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_changes_change_type FOREIGN KEY ("change_type") REFERENCES change_types ("change_type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_changes_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "change_types" (
  "change_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change type */,
  "change_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the change type (e.g., filter, action) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the change type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the change type (e.g., security, feature) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributors" (
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contributor */,
  "contributor_name" TEXT /* Name of the contributor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contributor */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the contributor (e.g., core developer, contributor) */,
  "github_username" TEXT /* GitHub username of the contributor */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the contributor is active */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the contributor joined the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributions" (
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution */,
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor who made the contribution */,
  "change_id" INTEGER /* ID of the change made by the contribution */,
  "contribution_date" TEXT /* Date the contribution was made */,
  "contribution_message" TEXT /* Message or comment with the contribution */,
  "is_accepted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the contribution has been accepted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_contributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("contributor_id") REFERENCES contributors ("contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_change_id FOREIGN KEY ("change_id") REFERENCES changes ("change_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., core developer, contributor, project manager) */,
  "github_username" TEXT /* GitHub username of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_versions" (
  "file_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file version */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version */,
  "file_contents" TEXT /* Contents of the file */,
  "file_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the file contents for integrity checking */,
  "is_committed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the file version has been committed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_versions_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_versions_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "change_comments" (
  "change_comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change comment */,
  "change_id" INTEGER /* ID of the change the comment was made on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment has been resolved */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_comments_change_id FOREIGN KEY ("change_id") REFERENCES changes ("change_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is the default role for new users */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "is_inherited" INTEGER /* Indicates if the permission is inherited from a role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("user_role_id")
)
